title: Verify incentive offer is controlled by backend configuration
description: Tests that the discount offer during the cancellation flow is only shown when it is enabled via a backend flag or configuration.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort.

steps.description: 1. Ensure the 'Incentive Offer' is disabled in the backend.
2. As the user, proceed through the cancellation flow past the 'Loss Aversion' gate.
4. Enable the 'Incentive Offer' in the backend.
5. With a different test user, repeat the cancellation flow.
6. Observe the screen after the 'Loss Aversion' gate.

expected_result: In step 3, the user should be taken directly to the feedback pop-up after confirming cancellation. In step 6, the user should be presented with the 'Incentive Offer' pop-up.
